questions.answer: Zeekr, a brand under Lotus Technology, has expanded its global presence significantly. As of 2024, Zeekr vehicles are available in multiple regions, including Europe, China, North America, and Southeast Asia. The brand has introduced several models, such as the Zeekr 001, Zeekr 009, Zeekr X, and Zeekr 7X, catering to diverse markets with a focus on premium electric vehicles. Additionally, Zeekr has established a strong R&D presence in Europe through Zeekr Technology Europe AB, which supports the development of next-generation mobility solutions tailored to international markets. The information is based on knowledge available before 2024-12-31.

rag_info.chunk_content: Lotus Technology currently holds 100% equity interest in Zeekr Tech EU through Zhejiang ZEEKR. In November 2022, Lotus Technology launched its second BEV model, Zeekr 009, and started delivery in January 2023. Lotus Technology later launched and started the delivery of Zeekr 009 Grand, a luxury version of Zeekr 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence, in May 2024. In April 2023, Lotus Technology released the Zeekr X, its compact SUV model, and began to deliver the Zeekr X in June 2023. In January 2024, Lotus Technology started to deliver its first upscale sedan model targeting tech-savvy adults and families. In May 2024, Lotus Technology completed an initial public offering and was listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol “ZK.” In June 2024, Lotus Technology officially expanded its presence into the Southeast Asia market. In September 2024, Lotus Technology officially unveiled and began the delivery of its premium electric five-seater SUV, the Zeekr 7X. In October 2024, Lotus Technology officially launched and commenced deliveries of the Zeekr MIX.
With a focus on global aesthetics, the team has crafted the distinctive design of Zeekr vehicles, such as the Zeekr 7X and Zeekr MIX.

Zeekr 001, Zeekr's first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV), is a premium crossover shooting brake developed with proprietary research and development (R&D), deep market insights, and the Sustainable Experience Architecture (SEA) platform. Launched in April 2021 with deliveries beginning in October 2021, the Zeekr 001 was the first mass-produced BEV with over $1,000 kilometers CLTC range. In October 2023, Zeekr introduced the Zeekr 001 FR, a high-performance variant featuring a lightweight carbon fiber body, 800V Qilin battery, and quad e-drive system, achieving 2.02 seconds 0-100 kilometers per hour acceleration and a 280 kilometers per hour top speed. In 2024, Zeekr launched upgraded versions of the Zeekr 001 with Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 and significant performance, safety, and intelligence upgrades.

Zeekr Technology Europe AB, or Zeekr Tech EU/ZTE, is Zeekr Technology's Sweden-based R&D center founded in 2013 that is strategically focused on the following aspects. Zeekr Technology Europe AB conducts R&D activities relating to the products that Zeekr Technology plans to roll out in overseas markets. These products include, among others, (i) next-generation mobility solutions, such as robotaxi, (ii) passenger battery electric vehicles (BEVs) satisfying local standards and customer preferences, and (iii) a series of digital offerings, such as data analytics tools and smart cockpit functions. ● Zeekr Technology Europe AB also implements the development of a variety of BEV-related technologies and capabilities, such as user-centric systems with in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities, in-vehicle centralized architecture, as well as a cloud-based data management platform for user experiences and data analytics. Zeekr Technology Europe AB also provides specific R&D services on a project basis. ● In addition, Zeekr Technology Europe AB has developed SEA-M, an advanced version of SEA featuring integration potential for autonomous driving systems and future smart mobility, to support Zeekr Technology’s next-generation BEVs. SEA-M is designed to enable mobility solutions that fulfill different use cases with superior driving experience, ultralong durability, and the capabilities for ongoing upgrades. BEVs developed on this platform, such as the Zeekr Mix and Waymo RT robotaxi, can have a number of innovative features, such as wide door openings with no B-pillar, highly flexible interiors, and advanced interior climate technologies. SEA-M will further facilitate the design for future BEV models.

Lotus Technology is a market player with a China focus and global aspirations. Currently, Lotus Technology mainly markets and sells its products in China, the largest BEV market globally in 2023, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology has Lotus Technology started to deliver the ZEEKR 001 in Europe in December 2023. In the future, Lotus Technology also plans to supply vehicles for the Waymo One Fleet in the United States. For details of Lotus Technology's plan to increase its global footprint, see “— Our Growth Strategies.” As of December 31, 2023, Lotus Technology delivered a total of 196,633 ZEEKR vehicles since the first vehicle delivery in October 2021, including 192,441 delivered in China. This is among the fastest delivery growth in the premium BEV market in China, according to Frost & Sullivan.

title: Zeekr 001 
summary: The Zeekr 001, launched in April 2021 as the first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) on the SEA platform, is a premium crossover shooting brake known for its remarkable range of over 1,000 km on the CLTC cycle. In October 2023, the high-performance Zeekr 001 FR variant was unveiled, featuring a lightweight carbon fiber body, an 800V Qilin battery, and a quad e-drive system that enables acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds, with a top speed of 280 km/h. In 2024, the Zeekr 001 received upgrades, including the Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 system, enhancing its performance, safety, and intelligence.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Customers try out Zeekr products and technologies, as well as participate in a wide range of events in the Zeekr Space, which usually occupies 100 square meters to 300 square meters in commercial areas. Lotus Technology has also launched Pop-Up Zeekr Spaces in China, which have more flexible leasing terms than the usual Zeekr Space and help the company connect with an expanded customer base. Zeekr Delivery Center. Lotus Technology utilizes Zeekr Delivery Centers for product delivery, most of which are located at facilities with large areas outside urban commercial centers to allow for vehicle storage and simultaneous delivery. Zeekr House. Lotus Technology launches additional Zeekr Houses in areas where car dealer shops are located across different tiers of cities in China, which allow the company to utilize the cluster effect and provide customers with a superior one-stop experience. Leveraging the service network of its sister brands in Geely Group, Lotus Technology plans to develop its Zeekr Houses cost-effectively and rapidly with the Zeekr brand and design. Through the Zeekr APP, prospective customers can place orders by paying a nonrefundable order deposit or production deposit. Relying on Lotus Technology's strong supply chain management capabilities inherited from Geely Group, Lotus Technology enables customers to choose from a vast pool of configurations, such as vehicle color, wheel hub size and style, air suspension system option, automatic door option, sound system, intelligent air conditioning package, and seat ventilation.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Direct Sales and Service Model 
summary: The company adopts a customer-centric go-to-market strategy, spearheaded by a skilled in-house sales and marketing team of 7,134 members, with a significant majority having extensive experience in the automobile and retail sectors. This team oversees a direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales network, which includes 538 offline locations—467 in China and 71 internationally—designed to provide a comprehensive, high-quality customer experience throughout the sales lifecycle. Key components of this network include the Zeekr Center, which serves as a premium showroom and community hub, and Zeekr Space, where customers can engage with products and attend events. Additionally, Zeekr Delivery Centers facilitate efficient product delivery, while Zeekr House locations are strategically positioned near car dealerships to enhance customer service through a one-stop experience. 

The Zeekr APP further streamlines the purchasing process, allowing customers to place orders with a nonrefundable deposit and customize their vehicle configurations. Following a 72-hour confirmation period, delivery specialists assist with pre-delivery arrangements and coordinate the final delivery, ensuring a seamless transition from order to ownership. This integrated approach not only enhances customer engagement but also leverages the Geely Group's supply chain to deliver value-added services efficiently.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: ZEEKR's products have been well received by the market, achieving a total delivery of 10,000 units of ZEEKR 001 in less than four months since its initial delivery in October 2021, which, according to Frost & Sullivan, is one of the fastest among the major mid- to high-end new energy vehicle (NEV) models and premium BEV models in China. Lotus Technology's current and future models will be primarily based on Geely Holding’s proprietary SEA, which is highly agile, compatible, and enables Lotus Technology to quickly build and launch a wide range of vehicle models catering to different demands in the premium BEV segment. Developed based on SEA, ZEEKR vehicles embody impressive vehicle performance, FOTA-enabled upgrades, superior driving and riding experiences, as well as striking and trendy designs that provide a comprehensive smart mobility experience to Lotus Technology's customers. • Outstanding battery and range performance. The up-to- $100 \mathrm{kWh}$ battery supports a maximum CLTC range of $741 \mathrm{km}$ on ZEEKR 001 and $750 \mathrm{km}$ on ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), respectively, which is ahead of most of the BEV models of Lotus Technology's peers, according to Frost & Sullivan. According to Frost & Sullivan, ZEEKR 009 is the world’s first pure-electric MPV model with over $800 \mathrm{km}$ CLTC range, and it has the longest all-electric range in the MPV market by the end of February 2024. • State-of-the-art autonomous driving expertise.

metadata.title_summary:
title: An Innovative Automotive Technology Company with Strong Product Offering to Capture Massive Premium BEV Market Opportunity 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company dedicated to creating premium electric vehicles and innovative solutions that promote the electrification and intelligentization of the automotive sector. Operating as an independent startup, ZEEKR utilizes its in-house research and development capabilities alongside a proprietary sales and marketing network, all managed by a diverse and efficient leadership team. Notably, while some executives have ties to Geely Auto, they will not hold executive roles post-offering, ensuring a distinct operational identity.

Since its launch less than three years ago, ZEEKR has introduced several models, including the ZEEKR 001, a five-seater crossover, the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, and the compact ZEEKR X SUV, among others. The brand has garnered significant market attention, achieving rapid sales milestones, such as 10,000 deliveries of the ZEEKR 001 shortly after its release, positioning it as one of China’s fastest-selling premium BEVs.

ZEEKR vehicles are built on Geely Holding's proprietary SEA platform, which facilitates swift development and launch of new models while ensuring exceptional performance and user experience. The ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 are recognized for their impressive range capabilities, with the ZEEKR 009 being the first pure-electric MPV to exceed 800 km in range. Additionally, ZEEKR incorporates advanced autonomous driving technologies powered by cutting-edge hardware, enhancing both performance and safety.

The company emphasizes customer satisfaction through a focus on innovative technology and premium features, such as customizable in-vehicle configurations and luxurious amenities in models like the ZEEKR 009 Grand, which includes heated massaging seats and high-quality entertainment systems. Overall, ZEEKR is committed to delivering a holistic smart mobility experience, setting a high standard in the premium BEV market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr’s smart cockpit is powered by Zeekr OS, an exclusive distributed operating system designed for battery electric vehicles (BEVs), seamlessly integrated with Zeekr's state-of-the-art electrical and electronic (E/E) architecture. By dynamically allocating processing power to services, functions, and applications in real-time, Zeekr OS optimizes cockpit interactions, autonomous driving, and vehicle control, ensuring a seamless and highly responsive user experience. Zeekr OS features a unified service-oriented architecture, in-house full-stack research and development (R&D), optimized network diagnostics, and automated software integration testing, eliminating system lag and enabling continuous updates. With multi-kernel compatibility (Linux, QNX), Zeekr OS supports 360-degree surround-view monitoring, parking assistance, and intelligent energy management, setting a new benchmark for BEV software architecture. The smart cockpit experience is further enhanced by the Qualcomm 8295 SoC-based platform, standard across all Zeekr vehicle models launched in 2024, with the Zeekr 009 Grand featuring the world’s first dual-8295 configuration. The Zeekr Sound audio system, equipped with AI-powered tuning, delivers premium acoustic performance, while the Human-Machine Interface (HMI) 3.5 introduces 3D navigation, advanced visual effects, and an intuitive Eva family interface. EVA, the AI-powered driving assistant, leverages machine learning, natural language processing (NLP), and computer vision to provide intelligent voice interaction, predictive assistance, and customizable AI personas. Additionally, Zeekr’s open cockpit ecosystem integrates a virtualized mobile platform, a Scenario Library, and Internet of Things (IoT) connectivity, allowing seamless integration with smart home devices, gaming, and entertainment applications such as Kid Zone, Tencent Cloud Gaming, and wireless karaoke.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Smart Cockpit 
summary: Zeekr's smart cockpit, set to launch in 2024, is powered by Zeekr OS, a specialized distributed operating system designed for battery electric vehicles (BEVs). This system integrates advanced electronic and electrical architecture, enabling real-time processing power allocation to enhance user interactions, autonomous driving, and vehicle control. Key features include a unified service-oriented architecture, in-house R&D, improved network diagnostics, and automated software integration testing, which together minimize system lag and support continuous updates. The multi-kernel compatibility allows for advanced functionalities like 360-degree surround-view monitoring and intelligent energy management, setting a new benchmark for BEV software.

The smart cockpit experience is further elevated by the Qualcomm 8295 SoC platform, particularly in the Zeekr 009 Grand, which boasts a dual-8295 configuration. The Zeekr Sound audio system delivers premium sound through AI-driven tuning, while the HMI 3.5 offers advanced 3D navigation and visual effects, enhanced by the intuitive Eva family interface. EVA, the AI assistant, leverages machine learning and natural language processing for intelligent voice interactions and customizable AI personas. The open cockpit ecosystem promotes a virtualized mobile platform and IoT connectivity, allowing integration with smart home devices and entertainment options like Kid Zone, Tencent Cloud Gaming, and wireless karaoke. Overall, Zeekr's smart cockpit, driven by Zeekr OS and AI advancements, aims to provide an immersive and connected driving experience.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Within less than three years since ZEEKR’s inception, ZEEKR has launched multiple commercialized electric vehicle models, namely ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001 is a five-seater crossover shooting brake BEV model targeting the premium market and mainly addressing the customer need for practical yet stylish traveling. ZEEKR released ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in February 2024 and started vehicle delivery in March 2024. ZEEKR 009 is a luxury six-seater MPV addressing the customer need for luxury mobility. In April 2023, ZEEKR released ZEEKR X, the compact SUV model, and began to deliver ZEEKR X in June 2023. ZEEKR also started to deliver ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023 and began to deliver the first upscale sedan model in January 2024. In addition to major upgrades such as the release of ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), ZEEKR has also been continuously fine-tuning and improving the performance of other BEV models. For example, ZEEKR updated the interior configurations of ZEEKR 009 and improved the chassis system of ZEEKR X in 2024. In April 2024, ZEEKR launched ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury version of ZEEKR 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence. ZEEKR also released ZEEKR MIX, the MPV model, in the same month.

title: Zeekr Tech EU 
summary: Zeekr Technology Europe AB (Zeekr Tech EU), established in 2013 in Sweden, serves as a research and development hub focused on creating innovative products for international markets. The organization specializes in next-generation mobility solutions, including robotaxis and battery electric vehicles (BEVs) tailored to local standards, alongside digital offerings like data analytics and smart cockpit functions. A significant focus is placed on advancing BEV technologies that prioritize user-centric systems, integrating in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities with centralized architecture for improved user experiences.

Central to Zeekr Tech EU's initiatives is the SEA-M platform, an evolution of the SEA architecture designed to support autonomous driving and smart mobility. This platform aims to deliver versatile mobility options, exceptional driving experiences, and long-lasting vehicles that can be continuously upgraded. BEVs developed on this platform, such as the Zeekr Mix and Waymo RT robotaxi, feature innovative designs, including wide door openings and flexible interiors. By the end of 2024, the company employed 733 individuals, focusing on mobility technologies, digital solutions, and future product development.

summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving innovation and electrification within the automotive industry. The company focuses on developing next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, leveraging strong in-house research and development capabilities and a flexible organizational structure to rapidly create and launch customer-oriented products.

The lineup also features the compact ZEEKR X SUV and a newly launched upscale sedan model, all designed to cater to diverse consumer needs while emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

The company is also committed to advancing its technological capabilities, focusing on electrification and intelligent mobility. This includes the development of its proprietary E/E architecture and ZEEKR OS, which facilitate over-the-air updates and the integration of cutting-edge autonomous driving technologies. 

As the global BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this potential by expanding its vehicle portfolio and enhancing its customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model. The company has established a comprehensive charging network and formed strategic partnerships to bolster its business development and global reach, positioning itself for continued success in the rapidly evolving electric vehicle landscape.

title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving the electrification and innovation of the automotive industry through the development of premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions. Since its inception, ZEEKR has focused on advancing BEV architecture, hardware, software, and the integration of new technologies, supported by strong in-house research and development (R&D) capabilities and an efficient organizational structure. This approach enables rapid product development and effective market strategies, facilitating swift expansion despite its relatively short operating history.

The company has made notable progress with its innovative vehicle lineup, which includes the ZEEKR 001, the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, launched in April 2021, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, introduced in November 2022. The ZEEKR 001 has achieved significant sales milestones, including delivering over 10,000 units within four months of its launch and surpassing 10,000 monthly deliveries in October 2022. By the end of 2023, ZEEKR had delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, positioning it as a rapidly growing player in the premium BEV market.

ZEEKR's development is underpinned by the SEA platform, an open-source modular architecture owned by Geely Holding, which allows for a diverse range of vehicle types and rapid integration of advanced technologies. The company benefits from Geely's extensive industry experience, innovative engineering, and strong supply chain management, which enhance product reliability and consumer interest.

In addition to its vehicle offerings, ZEEKR emphasizes a customer-centric approach, utilizing a direct-to-consumer sales model and a robust charging network to enhance the user experience. The company has formed strategic partnerships with leading firms like Mobileye and Waymo to advance autonomous driving technologies and expand its global reach.

The BEV market is poised for significant growth, particularly in China and Europe, with projections indicating a substantial increase in sales by 2028. ZEEKR is well-positioned to capitalize on these opportunities, focusing on next-generation mobility solutions that combine luxury, performance, and advanced technology.

The vehicle features a one-piece high-strength aluminum rear-end structure, achieving a CNCAP 5-star safety rating.

title: An Innovative Automotive Technology Company with Strong Product Offering to Capture Massive Premium BEV Market Opportunity 
summary: We are an innovative battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company dedicated to advancing the electrification and intelligentization of the automotive industry through premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions. As an independent startup, we utilize our in-house research and development and proprietary sales network, led by a diverse management team free from affiliations with Geely Auto, except for our chairman, Shufu Li, who will not have executive roles post-offering. Our commitment to exceptional customer service is reflected in our cutting-edge technology and entrepreneurial spirit.

Our premium BEV brand, ZEEKR, has rapidly gained traction since its launch, offering a range of models including the ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 009, and ZEEKR X, each designed to deliver an outstanding driving and ownership experience. The ZEEKR 001, a stylish five-seater crossover, has achieved remarkable sales, while the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV leads the market with an all-electric range exceeding 800 km. ZEEKR vehicles are built on Geely Holding's SEA platform, enabling quick development and deployment of models tailored to the premium market, featuring advanced performance, over-the-air upgrades, and sophisticated designs.

title: OUR VEHICLES 
summary: ZEEKR is strategically positioned in the premium battery electric vehicle (BEV) market, focusing on the design, engineering, and sale of advanced electric vehicles that enhance user experience and drivability. Leveraging its strong research and development capabilities and synergies with Geely Group, ZEEKR aims to tap into China's burgeoning premium BEV market, which is projected to grow significantly from 666,400 units in 2024 to 2,607,600 units by 2028, according to Frost & Sullivan.

Since its inception, ZEEKR has launched several models, starting with the ZEEKR 001 in 2021, followed by the upgraded 2024 model, the ZEEKR 009, and the compact SUV ZEEKR X. The company has also expanded its offerings with the ZEEKR 001 FR and an upscale sedan, reflecting its commitment to catering to diverse customer needs. As of December 31, 2023, ZEEKR has delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, marking one of the fastest growth rates in the premium BEV segment.

The monthly delivery data from June 2023 to March 2024 shows a consistent upward trend, with March 2024 witnessing 13,012 units delivered. This growth is indicative of rising consumer demand and ZEEKR's operational capabilities, positioning the company as a significant player in the global market. ZEEKR has also begun deliveries in Europe and plans to supply vehicles for the Waymo One Fleet in the U.S., highlighting its ambitions for international expansion. Overall, ZEEKR's trajectory reflects a robust commitment to innovation and market growth in the premium electric vehicle sector.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is a fast-growing BEV technology company. Through developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, Lotus Technology aspires to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Since its inception, Lotus Technology has focused on innovation in BEV architecture, hardware, software, and application of new technologies. The company's efforts are backed by strong in-house R&D capabilities, a deep understanding of products, high operational flexibility, and a flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, as well as a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. Lotus Technology strategically spearheaded the premium intelligent BEV market with unique positioning, featuring a strong sense of technology, in-house R&D capabilities, stylish design, high-caliber performance, and a premium user experience. The current product portfolio primarily includes ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to Lotus Technology's mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 is also the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 km CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology began the delivery of ZEEKR 001 in October 2021.

summary: ZEEKR is an innovative and rapidly expanding battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company committed to transforming the automobile industry through electrification and advanced technology. Additionally, ZEEKR is expanding its charging infrastructure and forming strategic partnerships with leading firms to support its growth and global expansion.

The BEV market is experiencing significant growth, particularly in China, where sales are projected to increase dramatically in the coming years. ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this trend by expanding its vehicle portfolio and exploring new markets, including the robotaxi sector in the United States. all_retrieved_content.page_content: The development of Lotus Technology's BEV models is powered by SEA, a set of open-source, electric and modularized platforms owned by Geely Holding compatible with A segment to E segment, covering sedan, SUV, MPV, hatchback, roadster, pick-up truck, and robotaxi, which have a wheelbase mainly between 1,800 mm to 3,300 mm. Lotus Technology depends on Geely Holding to allow the company to continue to utilize SEA, which is currently the most suitable platform for Lotus Technology. The widely compatible SEA enables robust R&D capabilities, execution efficiency, cost efficiency, and control consistency in the vehicle development process, giving Lotus Technology's BEVs significant competitive advantages in the market. SEA also offers the flexibility to quickly adopt and accommodate the latest and most advanced technology improvements. For example, Lotus Technology was able to equip ZEEKR 009 with CATL’s latest Qilin battery, making ZEEKR 009 the first mass-produced BEV model equipped with Qilin battery, according to Frost & Sullivan. Together with Lotus Technology's proprietary advanced battery solutions and highly efficient electric drive system, ZEEKR 009’s extended range version is the world’s first pure-electric MPV model with an over 800 km CLTC range and the longest all-electric range in the MPV market by the end of February 2024, according to Frost & Sullivan.

title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving innovation and electrification within the automotive industry. The company focuses on developing next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, leveraging strong in-house research and development capabilities and a flexible organizational structure to rapidly create and launch customer-oriented products. 

Since its inception, ZEEKR has introduced several groundbreaking models, including the ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake with a range exceeding 1,000 km, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, which offers an ultra-luxury experience. The lineup also features the compact ZEEKR X SUV and a newly launched upscale sedan model, all designed to cater to diverse consumer needs while emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

ZEEKR's growth trajectory has been impressive, with significant milestones such as delivering over 10,000 units of the ZEEKR 001 within four months of its launch and achieving a total of 196,633 vehicle deliveries by the end of 2023. The company benefits from its affiliation with Geely Group, which provides extensive industry expertise, innovative engineering, and a robust supply chain, enhancing ZEEKR's product reliability and market competitiveness.

The company is also committed to advancing its technological capabilities, focusing on electrification and intelligent mobility. This includes the development of its proprietary E/E architecture and ZEEKR OS, which facilitate over-the-air updates and the integration of cutting-edge autonomous driving technologies. 

As the global BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this potential by expanding its vehicle portfolio and enhancing its customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model. The company has established a comprehensive charging network and formed strategic partnerships to bolster its business development and global reach, positioning itself for continued success in the rapidly evolving electric vehicle landscape.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is a fast-growing BEV technology company. Through developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, Lotus Technology aspires to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Since its inception, Lotus Technology has focused on innovation in BEV architecture, hardware, software, and application of new technologies. Lotus Technology's efforts are backed by strong in-house R&D capabilities, a deep understanding of products, high operational flexibility, and a flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, as well as a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. Lotus Technology strategically spearheaded the premium intelligent BEV market with unique positioning, featuring a strong sense of technology, in-house R&D capabilities, stylish design, high-caliber performance, and a premium user experience. Lotus Technology's current product portfolio primarily includes ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. • ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to its mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 is also the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 km CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology began the delivery of ZEEKR 001 in October 2021.

Since its inception, ZEEKR has focused on advancing BEV architecture, hardware, software, and the integration of new technologies, supported by strong in-house research and development (R&D) capabilities and an efficient organizational structure. This approach enables rapid product development and effective market strategies, facilitating swift expansion despite its relatively short operating history.

The company has made notable progress with its innovative vehicle lineup, which includes the ZEEKR 001, the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, launched in April 2021, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, introduced in November 2022. The ZEEKR 001 has achieved significant sales milestones, including delivering over 10,000 units within four months of its launch and surpassing 10,000 monthly deliveries in October 2022. By the end of 2023, ZEEKR had delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, positioning it as a rapidly growing player in the premium BEV market.

ZEEKR's development is underpinned by the SEA platform, an open-source modular architecture owned by Geely Holding, which allows for a diverse range of vehicle types and rapid integration of advanced technologies. The company benefits from Geely's extensive industry experience, innovative engineering, and strong supply chain management, which enhance product reliability and consumer interest.

In addition to its vehicle offerings, ZEEKR emphasizes a customer-centric approach, utilizing a direct-to-consumer sales model and a robust charging network to enhance the user experience. The company has formed strategic partnerships with leading firms like Mobileye and Waymo to advance autonomous driving technologies and expand its global reach.

The BEV market is poised for significant growth, particularly in China and Europe, with projections indicating a substantial increase in sales by 2028. ZEEKR is well-positioned to capitalize on these opportunities, focusing on next-generation mobility solutions that combine luxury, performance, and advanced technology.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology has established a comprehensive charging network and provided hassle-free charging services through at-home charging solutions, on-the-road charging solutions, and 24/7 charging fleets. The ultra charging stations, in particular, provide users with an ultimate charging experience through Lotus Technology's proprietary ultra-fast charging technology developed by Ningbo Viridi. As of December 31, 2023, there were 882 ZEEKR charging stations with different charging capabilities, including 436 ultra charging stations, 330 super charging stations, and 116 light charging stations, covering over 130 cities in China, further supported by over 54 thousand third-party charging stations that cover over 340 cities in China with approximately 610 thousand charging piles in total. Lotus Technology has established in-depth partnerships with a number of internationally renowned smart mobility companies, laying a solid foundation for its business development and global expansion. For example, Lotus Technology collaborates with Mobileye, a subsidiary of Intel and one of its strategic investors, for consumer-ready autonomous driving solutions. Going forward, Lotus Technology will continue to deepen its collaboration with Mobileye. Lotus Technology is working with Waymo, a leader in L4 autonomous driving technology, to supply vehicles for the Waymo One Fleet. The vehicles are purpose-built TaaS vehicles based on SEA-M, which is an advanced version of SEA and a high-tech mobility solution that supports a range of future mobility products including robotaxis and logistics vehicles. Furthermore, Lotus Technology has deep relationships with a range of leading suppliers, such as CATL, Bosch, and Aptiv.

title: An Innovative Automotive Technology Company with Strong Product Offering to Capture Massive Premium BEV Market Opportunity 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company dedicated to creating premium electric vehicles and innovative solutions that promote the electrification and intelligentization of the automotive sector. Operating as an independent startup, ZEEKR utilizes its in-house research and development capabilities alongside a proprietary sales and marketing network, all managed by a diverse and efficient leadership team. Notably, while some executives have ties to Geely Auto, they will not hold executive roles post-offering, ensuring a distinct operational identity.

Since its launch less than three years ago, ZEEKR has introduced several models, including the ZEEKR 001, a five-seater crossover, the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, and the compact ZEEKR X SUV, among others. The brand has garnered significant market attention, achieving rapid sales milestones, such as 10,000 deliveries of the ZEEKR 001 shortly after its release, positioning it as one of China’s fastest-selling premium BEVs.

ZEEKR vehicles are built on Geely Holding's proprietary SEA platform, which facilitates swift development and launch of new models while ensuring exceptional performance and user experience. The ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 are recognized for their impressive range capabilities, with the ZEEKR 009 being the first pure-electric MPV to exceed 800 km in range. Additionally, ZEEKR incorporates advanced autonomous driving technologies powered by cutting-edge hardware, enhancing both performance and safety.

The company emphasizes customer satisfaction through a focus on innovative technology and premium features, such as customizable in-vehicle configurations and luxurious amenities in models like the ZEEKR 009 Grand, which includes heated massaging seats and high-quality entertainment systems. Overall, ZEEKR is committed to delivering a holistic smart mobility experience, setting a high standard in the premium BEV market.

title: OUR VEHICLES 
summary: ZEEKR is strategically positioned in the premium battery electric vehicle (BEV) market, focusing on the design, engineering, and sales of advanced electric vehicles that enhance user experience and drivability. Leveraging its strong research and development capabilities and synergies with the Geely Group, ZEEKR aims to tap into the rapidly growing premium BEV market in China, which is projected to see sales increase from 666,400 units in 2024 to 2,607,600 units by 2028, reflecting a compound annual growth rate of 40.6%. 

Since its launch of the ZEEKR 001 in 2021, the company has expanded its lineup with models like the ZEEKR 009 and ZEEKR X, while also planning to introduce an upscale sedan. As of December 31, 2023, ZEEKR has delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, showcasing one of the fastest growth rates in the premium BEV segment. The company is now also entering the European market and has plans for future deliveries in the United States.

In terms of delivery performance, ZEEKR has consistently exceeded 10,000 units per month since mid-2023, with notable peaks such as 13,476 units in December 2023. This impressive growth trajectory underscores ZEEKR's commitment to expanding its market presence and catering to diverse customer preferences in the evolving landscape of next-generation mobility.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is strategically focused on the design, engineering, development, and sales of premium battery electric vehicles (BEVs) featuring cutting-edge technology, drivability, and user experience. Lotus Technology leverages extensive research and development capabilities, deep industry know-how, and synergies with Geely Group to tap into China’s massive, fast-growing premium BEV segment with great market potential. According to Frost & Sullivan, the sales volume of premium BEVs in China is expected to increase from 666.4 thousand units in 2024 to 2,607.6 thousand units in 2028 at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 40.6%. For details of the growth trend of premium BEV sales in China, see “Industry Overview — China NEV and BEV Market Overview.” In 2021, Lotus Technology released and started to deliver the ZEEKR 001, its first mass-produced premium battery electric vehicle model. Lotus Technology released an upgraded version of the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in February 2024 and started vehicle delivery in March 2024. In November 2022, Lotus Technology launched its second vehicle model, the ZEEKR 009, and started delivery in January 2023. In April 2023, Lotus Technology released the ZEEKR X, its compact SUV model, and began to deliver the ZEEKR X in June 2023. Lotus Technology also started to deliver the ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023. In January 2024, Lotus Technology started to deliver its first upscale sedan model. Going forward, Lotus Technology plans to offer an expanded product portfolio to meet varied customer demands and preferences. For instance, Lotus Technology plans to launch vehicles for next generation mobility lifestyle.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology began as a business unit within Geely Auto in October 2017. Under the leadership of the co-founders, Mr. Shufu Li, Mr. Conghui An, Mr. Donghui Li, and Mr. Shengyue Gui, Lotus Technology incorporated ZEEKR Intelligent Technology as an exempted company with limited liability in March 2021 under the law of the Cayman Islands to act as its holding company. In April 2021, Zeekr Innovation, currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology, was incorporated under the laws of the British Virgin Islands. In the same period, Zeekr Technology, currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of Zeekr Innovation, was incorporated under the laws of Hong Kong. In April 2021, Lotus Technology announced the launch of its first BEV model, Zeekr 001, and started delivery from October 2021. Subsequently, Lotus Technology commenced deliveries of various upgraded models, including but not limited to Zeekr 001 FR in October 2023 and upgraded Zeekr 001 in February 2024. In July 2021, ZEEKR Shanghai acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay from Geely Holding. In July 2021, Zhejiang ZEEKR was incorporated in the People's Republic of China and is currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of Zeekr Innovation. In August 2021, ZEEKR Innovation acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Shanghai (99% from Geely Auto and 1% from Geely Holding). In October 2021, Lotus Technology acquired a 51% equity interest in Ningbo Viridi, which was previously wholly-owned by Geely Holding. In February 2022, Lotus Technology acquired 100% equity interest in Zeekr Tech EU from Geely Holding.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Corporate History 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology began as a division of Geely Auto in October 2017 and became a holding company in March 2021 under Cayman Islands law. Co-founded by key figures including Mr. Shufu Li and Mr. Conghui An, the company established several subsidiaries, including Zeekr Innovation in the British Virgin Islands and Zeekr Technology in Hong Kong. The launch of their first battery electric vehicle (BEV), the Zeekr 001, occurred in April 2021, with deliveries starting in October of the same year. The company has since introduced upgraded versions, including the Zeekr 001 FR in October 2023 and plans for another upgrade in February 2024.

In July 2021, ZEEKR Shanghai acquired ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay, and later that year, it obtained full ownership of ZEEKR Shanghai and a majority stake in Ningbo Viridi. By February 2022, ZEEKR had fully acquired Zeekr Tech EU. The company expanded its vehicle lineup with the Zeekr 009 in November 2022, followed by the luxury Zeekr 009 Grand in May 2024, and the compact SUV Zeekr X in April 2023. 

In January 2024, ZEEKR launched its first upscale sedan aimed at tech-savvy consumers. The company went public in May 2024, listing on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker "ZK," and expanded into Southeast Asia in June 2024. The latest additions to its vehicle offerings include the Zeekr 7X, a premium electric SUV launched in September 2024, and the Zeekr MIX, which began deliveries in October 2024.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology currently holds 100% equity interest in Zeekr Tech EU through Zhejiang ZEEKR. In November 2022, Lotus Technology launched its second BEV model, Zeekr 009, and started delivery in January 2023. Lotus Technology later launched and started the delivery of Zeekr 009 Grand, a luxury version of Zeekr 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence, in May 2024. In April 2023, Lotus Technology released the Zeekr X, its compact SUV model, and began to deliver the Zeekr X in June 2023. In January 2024, Lotus Technology started to deliver its first upscale sedan model targeting tech-savvy adults and families. In May 2024, Lotus Technology completed an initial public offering and was listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol “ZK.” In June 2024, Lotus Technology officially expanded its presence into the Southeast Asia market. In September 2024, Lotus Technology officially unveiled and began the delivery of its premium electric five-seater SUV, the Zeekr 7X. In October 2024, Lotus Technology officially launched and commenced deliveries of the Zeekr MIX.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: The success of Lotus Technology's business ultimately depends on consumer spending. Lotus Technology derives a substantial part of its revenues from China. As a result, Lotus Technology's revenues and financial results are impacted to a significant extent by economic conditions in China and globally. The global macroeconomic environment is facing challenges, including the economic slowdown in the Eurozone since 2014, the potential impact of the United Kingdom’s exit from the EU on January 31, 2020, and the adverse impact on global economies and financial markets from the COVID-19 pandemic. There is considerable uncertainty over the long-term effects of the expansionary monetary and fiscal policies adopted by the central banks and financial authorities of some of the world’s leading economies, including the United States and China. There have been concerns over unrest and terrorist threats in the Middle East, Europe, and Africa, as well as over the conflicts involving Ukraine, Syria, and North Korea. There have also been concerns about the relationship between China and other Asian countries, which may result in or intensify potential conflicts related to territorial disputes and the trade disputes between the United States and China. The ongoing trade tensions between the United States and China may have a tremendous negative impact on the economies of not merely the two countries concerned, but the global economy as a whole. It is unclear whether these challenges and uncertainties will be contained or resolved, and what effects they may have on global political and economic conditions in the long term.

metadata.title_summary:
title: A severe or prolonged downturn in the PRC or global economy could materially and adversely affect our business, results of operations and financial condition. 
summary: The success of our business is closely tied to consumer spending, especially in China, which plays a crucial role in our revenue and financial health. Currently, we are navigating a challenging global macroeconomic landscape marked by a prolonged economic slowdown in the Eurozone, uncertainties related to the UK's EU exit, and the lingering effects of the COVID-19 pandemic on economies worldwide. Furthermore, the long-term implications of expansive monetary and fiscal policies in major economies, including the U.S. and China, remain uncertain. Geopolitical tensions, particularly trade disputes between the U.S. and China, add to the complexity, posing risks not only to the involved nations but also to the global economy. 

China's economic performance is significantly shaped by global trends and domestic policies, and while it has experienced substantial growth over the years, this growth has been uneven and has recently slowed. Concerns about potential downturns could lead to tighter credit conditions, increased market volatility, and diminished consumer and business confidence, all of which could hinder our ability to raise capital effectively. Sales of high-end and luxury products, such as performance electric vehicles, are particularly susceptible to changes in discretionary spending, and economic uncertainty may prompt consumers to delay or reduce their purchases, potentially harming our operational performance.

metadata.title_summary:
title: 4.B. Business Overview 
summary: We are a prominent premium new energy vehicle group under Geely Holding Group, committed to transforming the automobile industry with next-generation battery electric vehicles (BEVs) and innovative technology solutions. Our emphasis on advanced BEV architecture, hardware, software, and the integration of new technologies positions us strategically in the premium intelligent BEV market. We prioritize in-house research and development, stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences, enabling rapid product development and effective market strategies for swift expansion.

Our brand, Zeekr, leverages the SEA open-source modular platform to optimize R&D efficiency and cost-effectiveness while enhancing our new energy vehicles. Drawing on Geely's engineering expertise and manufacturing capabilities, Zeekr aims for scalable production and innovation through dedicated technology hubs in Sweden and China, focusing on intelligent mobility and energy solutions. We enhance customer experiences with a comprehensive network of offline touchpoints, online communities, and extensive charging options, while actively pursuing international market growth. Our distinctive vehicle designs, such as the Zeekr 7X and Zeekr MIX, are crafted by a pioneering design team in Gothenburg, Sweden, reflecting global aesthetics and innovation.
